title: vernonia longipedunculata var. manikensis
intro: Vernonia longipedunculata var. manikensis, also known as Manike vernonia, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The leaves and roots of Vernonia longipedunculata var. manikensis are used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
